description: Two conflicting reports-to facts flagged by lint; synthesis must surface an inline italic *Contradiction:* callout and must NOT silently pick a winner.

template_vars.CurrentBody:
# Sarah Jones

Sarah is VP of Sales at [[company/acme-corp|Acme Corp]].

Contradictions.Reason: Conflicting manager on the same subject/predicate with both valid_until null.

must_not_include:
Sarah reports to Michael Chen.

Sarah is
expected.notes: Guards Section 10.2 rule 4: mark contradictions as italic *Contradiction:* callouts inline; renderer upgrades to hatnote. Synthesizer is NOT a judge; never silently pick a winner. Devil's-advocate M14 strengthening: a lone "Michael Chen.\n" or "David Park.\n" at the top of the body (which would mean picking a winner) is banned; both names must appear together inside the *Contradiction: callout; the *Contradiction: string must appear exactly once (no duplicate callouts for the same pair).
